updates.title: Timestamp Stability Protocol (Thumb Rule)
updates.description: Enforced a zero-overlap layout system for all message types. Audio, Document, and Text bubbles now feature reserved 'safety islands' for metadata to prevent UI collapse.
updates.rationale: Ensures professional readability and prevents the 'merging' of filenames with timing data on narrow mobile screens.

updates.title: Prestigious Front-Layer Particle Physics
updates.description: Migrated orange live sparks to a global fixed overlay at Z-index 600. Optimized shadow-glow to 25px with stable high-entropy randomization.
updates.rationale: Achieves the intended 'prestigious' atmosphere by ensuring particles float over all content without being clipped by scroll containers.

updates.title: Android Navigation Thumb Rule
updates.description: Integrated popstate history injection. Android/Mobile back gestures are now captured to close active modals and the Build Book instead of exiting the platform.
updates.rationale: Critical for native-app feel and preventing accidental session termination during navigation.

updates.title: Build Book Technical Architecture
updates.description: Decommissioned 'Update Logs' in favor of the 'Build Book' and 'Build Theory' protocol. Implemented immersive greenery glow and technical rationale tracking.
updates.rationale: Shifts the platform identity towards a more authoritative and architectural development style.

updates.title: Firestore Message Integrity Fix
updates.description: Resolved a critical 'addDoc' failure where undefined captions caused upload crashes. Implemented stable string fallback for all media metadata.
updates.rationale: Restores 100% stability to the photo and document sharing infrastructure.

updates.title: Infrastructure Expansion: 200MB Storage
updates.description: Re-engineered file handling to support up to 200MB per attachment across all formats (PDF, ZIP, RAR, HTML, etc.).
updates.rationale: Empowers users to share professional-grade project files without compression or size constraints.

updates.title: Suspension: Pure Glassmorphism 2.0
updates.description: The full-screen high-refraction Glassmorphism 2.0 experiment has been suspended. While backdrop blurs are active, the complex multi-layer frosted highlights were removed to preserve 120Hz performance on mobile.
updates.rationale: High-fidelity performance and battery life on mobile devices prioritized over heavy CSS filter chains.

updates.title: Visual Identity & Doodle Layer
updates.description: Integrated custom WhatsApp-style background doodles and real-time upload feedback systems.
updates.rationale: Establishes the base emotional resonance of the chat environment.
